title: Delegate and schedule tasks in Claude Cowork
summary: Claude Cowork is a feature that enables users to delegate work and schedule recurring tasks such as meeting prep and content scans. It is presented as a practical tool for automating task management workflows.
writeup: The video covers Claude Cowork, a feature for delegating work and scheduling recurring tasks. Demonstrated use cases include meeting preparation and periodic content scans, with the tool managing task automation and delegation workflows. The core takeaway: Cowork supports both one-off delegation and tasks set to repeat on a schedule.
